description: This is an HTML source file for a web-based database viewer interface, containing markup, styles, and embedded JavaScript for interacting with database APIs, displaying data tables, and managing user interactions.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches and displays the list of available databases.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list and resets the view.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the table list for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and renders data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates the HTML for displaying table data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual table cell content, handling objects, long texts, and null values.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content to show full or truncated data.
